ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "gii_score" REAL /* Global Innovation Index score for the country */,
  "innovation_efficiency_ratio" REAL /* Innovation efficiency ratio for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "innovation_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "innovation_input_index" REAL /* Input sub-index for innovation */,
  "innovation_output_index" REAL /* Output sub-index for innovation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sub-indices */,
  "innovation_input_subindex_1" REAL /* Specific sub-index for innovation input (e.g., R&D expenditure) */,
  "innovation_input_subindex_2" REAL /* Another specific sub-index for innovation input (e.g., patents filed) */,
  "innovation_output_subindex_1" REAL /* Specific sub-index for innovation output (e.g., scientific publications) */,
  "innovation_output_subindex_2" REAL /* Another specific sub-index for innovation output (e.g., new technology companies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_innovation_indices_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "institutional_score" REAL /* Institutional score reflecting the quality of institutions */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the institutional metrics */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Measure of political stability */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Measure of government effectiveness */,
  "regulatory_quality" REAL /* Measure of regulatory quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "human_capital" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "human_capital_score" REAL /* Score for human capital and research */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the human capital metrics */,
  "education_quality" REAL /* Measure of education quality */,
  "research_and_development" REAL /* Measure of R&D activities */,
  "talent_retention" REAL /* Measure of talent retention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_human_capital_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "infrastructure_score" REAL /* Score for infrastructure quality and availability */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the infrastructure metrics */,
  "transport" REAL /* Measure of transport infrastructure */,
  "energy" REAL /* Measure of energy infrastructure */,
  "communications" REAL /* Measure of communication infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sophistication" (
  "market_sophistication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sophistication entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "sophistication_score" REAL /* Score for market sophistication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the market sophistication metrics */,
  "market_accessibility" REAL /* Measure of market accessibility */,
  "market_competition" REAL /* Measure of market competition */,
  "market_dynamics" REAL /* Measure of market dynamics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_sophistication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sophistication_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_sophistication" (
  "business_sophistication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business sophistication entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "sophistication_score" REAL /* Score for business sophistication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the business sophistication metrics */,
  "business_environment" REAL /* Measure of business environment */,
  "business_strategy" REAL /* Measure of business strategy */,
  "business_structure" REAL /* Measure of business structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_sophistication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_sophistication_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_outputs" (
  "knowledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge output entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "output_score" REAL /* Score for knowledge and technology outputs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the knowledge and technology output metrics */,
  "patents_granted" INTEGER /* Number of patents granted */,
  "scientific_publications" INTEGER /* Number of scientific publications */,
  "high_tech_exports" REAL /* Value of high-tech exports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_outputs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creative_outputs" (
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creative output entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "output_score" REAL /* Score for creative outputs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the creative output metrics */,
  "cultural_exports" REAL /* Value of cultural exports */,
  "creative_industries" REAL /* Size of creative industries */,
  "innovative_startups" INTEGER /* Number of innovative startups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creative_outputs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed content of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
